title: Floral Russian Jumbo Shrimp Blini
description: A crispy and adventurous Russian dish featuring jumbo shrimp, blending the freshness of flowers with the richness of blini.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, eggs, honey, and salt. Gradually add heavy cream, whisking until smooth. The batter should still be slightly lumpy.
Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Brush with butter.
Using a 1/4 cup measuring cup, scoop the batter onto the skillet or griddle, making 6-8 blini.
Cook for 2-3 minutes on the first side, or until bubbles appear on the surface and the edges start to dry.
Flip the blini and cook for another 1-2 minutes, or until golden brown.
Meanwhile, peel and de-vein the jumbo shrimp. Season with cayenne pepper, black pepper, and lemon zest.
Add a small amount of oil to a skillet over medium heat. Add the shrimp and cook until pink and opaque, about 2-3 minutes per side.
To assemble the dish, place a cooked blini on a plate, top with a cooked shrimp, and garnish with edible flowers and chives.
